features: designed with a 2.06" HD touch screen with 320*385 HD resolution, flexible touch response, and detailed image quality. Even in bright sunlight, the display remains clear and vivid, delivering an experience that feels remarkably close to reality. There are multiple sets of theme UI. You can also choose from more than 100 online watch faces in the "FitCloudPro" APP or upload photos as fitness tracker backgrounds, customizing the dial to release your unique personality and explore endless possibilities.

Built-in GPS & Long Battery Life: This smart watch for men is specially tailored for sports and field lovers. With its advanced satellite positioning system, the mens smart watches quickly connects to GPS and displays your outdoor route through your phone when running, cycling, or hiking. With a 380mAh large-capacity battery, this running watch delivers up to 20 days of standby and 5 days of typical daily use. Less charging, more doing — always ready for your next move.

Bluetooth Calls & Intelligent Voice Assistant: This step counter watch features dual mode smart Bluetooth call with 8773EWE one-click connection. Enabling direct call making and answering.This fitness watch for men syncs SMS and messages from apps (WhatsApp, Facebook, etc.), so you can stay connected and never miss anything important, even while exercising or driving.With intelligent voice assistant built-in, you can check the weather, set an alarm, or do other things, which leaves your hands free.

24/7 Health Monitoring Features:The android smart watch uses high-performance optical sensors to tracks vital health metrics—blood oxygen, heart rate, women's health, and sleep analysis.It will monitor your sleep status automatically period around and provides comprehensive sleep quality analysis,which can help you better understand health and adjust lifestyle reasonably,so better sleep starts now.

100+ Sports Modes & IP68 Waterproof: This smartwatch supports 100+ sports modes: running/cycling/climbing/yoga etc. Equipped with high-precision sensors, the sports watch accurately tracks steps, distance, calories burned, and workout duration to help analyze performance and optimize training plans.With an IP68 waterproof rating, the waterproof smartwatch keeps you worry-free from rain and sweat. One tap to start sports mode, the smartwatch for men will become your reliable fitness assistant, letting you focus on your workout.

More Smart Tools: This cool stuff also has other practical daily functions, such as Smart language assistant, mute alarm clock, shake to take photos, music control, sedentary reminder, drink water reminder, weather display and more, waiting for you to explore. Connect the APP, open the call Bluetooth, can answer in the watch terminal, refuse to answer, dial, call. Connect APP, open audio Bluetooth, can play music and control mobile phone music playback.
